sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A bei thei lo heihpih na leh
itna in ki zem den a
Zing nisuakbang in thakzel a
Ni a suah pelmawh bang in

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Itna kip leh hehpihna in
Mihing ta te tungah
Na bawl lamdang nate hang in
Topa nang kong phat uh hi
Leivui pan in Nong lamto aa
Nin phual pan in Nong dom to hi
Pahtawi na leh minthanna tawh
Ka nunna nong hei sak hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nang na hoih hi Nang na hoih hi
Na itna kip tawntung hi
Na kilawmhi Na kilawm hi
Phat ding in Na kilawm hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nang na lian hi Na thuman hi
Nang tawh kibang om lo hi
Nong lahsa thulamdang te hang
Ka dai om mawk thei kei hi
